productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Green Dress
description: Composition Green above knee leeveless dress made of 100% cotton, has a round neck and panel stitching, pockets on the sides and a zipper at the back Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casually comfortable with this pretty dress from united colors of benetton. The stylish pattern adds to your femininity, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair this with heeled sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33"
